External DJW section anchors

Generated: 2026-07-11
Producer: xdelta3 3.2.0
Release commit: ff322e592383227b0d65ddfde7e0e5bbc504dc15
Executable SHA-256: 53d90226615f217d3380c39892833311b4e24acd863e1ca01f14b5e772e2e6d0
Build configuration: producers/xdelta-3.2.0-config.txt, including SECONDARY_DJW=1
Environment: XDELTA unset

Target generation:

one = bytes(65 + ((i * 17 + i // 7) % 12) for i in range(512))

multi = bytearray()
for sector in range(200):
    family = sector % 4
    base = family * 48
    for i in range(10):
        multi.append((base + ((i * 7 + sector // 4) % 24)) & 0xff)

Commands:

xdelta3.exe -f -e -A -N -n -S djw1 one.raw one.vcdiff
xdelta3.exe -f -e -A -N -n -S none one.raw one-none.vcdiff
xdelta3.exe -f -e -A -N -n -S djw9 multi.raw multi.vcdiff
xdelta3.exe -f -e -A -N -n -S none multi.raw multi-none.vcdiff
xdelta3.exe -f -d one.vcdiff one.decoded
xdelta3.exe -f -d multi.vcdiff multi.decoded

The DATA section was parsed from each VCDIFF file. The decoded-size varint was removed from the
DJW form to produce the payload anchor. The matching DATA bytes from the -S none form produced the
raw anchor. Both complete DJW deltas were decoded by the producer and matched their generated target.

one.vcdiff: 218 bytes, SHA-256 3d3c6bdfb0117b2de7a4b35ce8882dd4539bedfed3ffb083375d000b3243f607, CRC32 02a62548

Wire checks:

The one-table payload declares one group.
The multi-table payload declares two groups.
The multi-table cfg(test) trace records 48 implicit-zero code-length positions while a run is pending.
